label: Seamline Dormitory
description: Seamline Dormitory is a narrow sleeping chamber set along the temple’s inlaid fault geometry, its walls faced in dust-slick vitrified tile that holds a constant copper-white sheen. A recessed berth platform and built-in storage niches are cut to faceted planes, minimizing loose furnishings and preserving the canon’s ordered interior. A grounded gutter runs the room’s perimeter, drawing electrostatic glass dust into a lidded catch channel that feeds the temple’s lensing cisterns. Mirror-slat louvers above the threshold admit calibrated twilight as thin, parallel bars that mark local time across the floor.
